mapper.insert: insert into product(p_code, p_name, p_price, p_type, p_content) values(product_seq.nextval, #{pname}, #{price}, #{ptype}, #{pcontent})
mapper.select: select p_code from product where p_name = #{pname} and p_price = #{price}
mapper.insert:
select max(p_code) from product
insert into productopt(p_code, po_size, po_color, p_amount) values(#{pcode}, #{psize}, #{pcolor}, #{pamount})
